name: localnest-mcp
author: LocalNest
description: LocalNest read-only MCP server for exposing project context from local machine

scripts.quality: npm run check && npm run lint && npm run test:coverage && npm run quality:cycles && npm run quality:deps && npm run quality:package && npm run quality:audit
scripts.check: node --check src/localnest-mcp.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/migrations/config-migrator.js && node --check src/server/schemas.js && node --check src/server/tool-utils.js && node --check src/server/status.js && node --check src/server/register-core-tools.js && node --check src/server/register-memory-workflow-tools.js && node --check src/server/register-memory-store-tools.js && node --check src/server/register-retrieval-tools.js && node --check src/services/workspace-service.js && node --check src/services/tokenizer.js && node --check src/services/search-service.js && node --check src/services/vector-index-service.js && node --check src/services/sqlite-vec-index-service.js && node --check src/services/update-service.js && node --check src/services/memory-service.js && node --check src/services/memory-store.js && node --check src/services/memory-workflow-service.js && node --check scripts/setup-localnest.mjs && node --check scripts/doctor-localnest.mjs && node --check scripts/install-localnest-skill.mjs && node --check scripts/task-context-localnest.mjs && node --check scripts/capture-outcome-localnest.mjs && node --check scripts/memory-workflow-cli-utils.mjs && node --check scripts/quality-audit.mjs && node --check scripts/quality-package.mjs && node --check bin/localnest-mcp.js && node --check bin/localnest-mcp-setup.js && node --check bin/localnest-mcp-doctor.js && node --check bin/localnest-mcp-install-skill.js && node --check bin/localnest-mcp-task-context.js && node --check bin/localnest-mcp-capture-outcome.js
